required_operator_inputs: start from codex/parameter-functionality-campaign after fixed-family fold/mix is integrated
add a reusable deterministic parameter surface descriptor/export guardrail
derive descriptor rows from checked-in schema and binding authority
use runtime CLI proof without opening the viewer or using mouse automation
forbidden_operator_prompts: change fractal formulas or add new fractal behavior
change Color Pipeline, capture finding, FPS pacing, equation-pack viewport integration, perturbation zoom, generated editors, or renderer architecture
hardcode a Python subset as descriptor authority
use OS mouse automation or physical cursor tests
required_validation_commands: py -3.14 tools/viewer_host_run_logged_command.py --label pfc_descriptor_native --log artifacts/logs/pfc_descriptor_native.log --out-json artifacts/validation/pfc_descriptor_native.json --heartbeat-seconds 30 --timeout-seconds 900 -- ui_app/build_tests_vsdevcmd.cmd test_fractal_parameter_surface_descriptor

py -3.14 tools/viewer_host_run_logged_command.py --label pfc_descriptor_schema --log artifacts/logs/pfc_descriptor_schema.log --out-json artifacts/validation/pfc_descriptor_schema.json --heartbeat-seconds 30 --timeout-seconds 900 -- ui_app/build_tests_vsdevcmd.cmd advanced_color_grading_owner
